results.rendered_html:
pratud 6 P. To strike, hurt, wound.
— Caus.
1 To urge on, drive forward; (fig.) to press, urge repeatedly (to do a thing); praviśa gṛhamiti pratodyaptānā na calati bhāgyakṛtāṃ daśāmavekṣya  Mk. 1. 56. 
2 To pierce, cut.
